nodes.label: The objective reframe — wall is intrinsic to energy-goodness, not locality
nodes.rationale: The single most important finding of the Phase-3 literature pass (2026-06-21); narrows (does not overturn) Phase 2's verdict that depth is impossible for forward-only locality — the barrier is the energy-goodness objective specifically.

nodes.label: P2.2 verdict re-stated: depth-impossible for energy-goodness, not for forward-only locality
nodes.rationale: P2.2 only ever varied the negative-selection within the energy-goodness family (G=sum h^2); it never tested a predictive/info-preserving objective — that different kind of objective composes with depth, forward-only, gradient-isolated, and unsupervised.

nodes.label: GIM existence proof (matches end-to-end backprop)
nodes.rationale: Gradient-isolated modules, forward-only, InfoNCE local objective, demonstrably scales with depth (error falls layer 1->5), matches/beats end-to-end backprop on STL-10 and speaker-ID; proves the barrier is the energy-goodness objective, not forward-only locality.

nodes.label: 'Can Local Learning Match SSL-BP?' 2026 confirmation (tests SCFF by name)
nodes.rationale: Benchmarks CLAPP/FF/LPL/SCFF explicitly against backprop-SSL; CLAPP++ hits 80.51% vs BP-CLAPP++ 80.49% on CIFAR-10; identifies direct feedback (top-down broadcast) and constant width (no tapering) as the two cheap coordination fixes.

nodes.label: Per-layer masked-feature reconstruction (flat-MLP objective candidate)
nodes.rationale: GIM/CLAPP earn depth on spatial/temporal data ('predict the next patch/timestep'); flat-MLP has no sequence to predict but always has held-out dimensions to reconstruct — decided as the Phase-3 primary objective candidate, single-sample, no negatives, forward-only.

nodes.label: Deep Belief Nets / stacked denoising autoencoders (older existence proof)
nodes.rationale: Pre-backprop-SSL deep nets trained unsupervised, layer-locally, greedily by reconstruction, frozen, then stacked — the direct ancestor of GIM; composed with depth because the objective was information-preserving (reconstruction), not energy — picks the Phase-3 masked-reconstruction objective.
